stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
You are flying at FL200 from Perth (32ºS,116ºE) to Jakarta (06.2ºS,107ºE). What can you tell about turbulence?

options.a: You will not have to worry about turbulence.
options.b: The aircraft will experience moderate to severe icing but no turbulence.
options.c: During cruise, the aircraft may encounter severe turbulence.
options.d: During cruise, the aircraft may encounter moderate turbulence only.
